Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class MultilineCheck

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<MultilineCheck,String>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.MultilineCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<MultilineCheck,String>
public final class MultilineCheck extends AbstractCheck<MultilineCheck,String>
Fluent assertions for multiline strings. Uses the existing Diff engine for line-by-line comparison. 

 checkThatMultiline(output)
     .hasLineCount(5)
     .line(0).startsWith("HTTP/1.1")
     ;

 checkThatMultiline(actual).isEqualTo(expected);  // shows line-by-line diff on failure

    • isEqualTo

      public MultilineCheck isEqualTo(String expected)
      Compares against expected multiline content with a line-by-line diff on failure. Uses the built-in Diff engine.

    • isEqualToNormalized

      public MultilineCheck isEqualToNormalized(String expected)
      Asserts that the content is equal to expected after trimming each line and ignoring trailing whitespace differences.
